vocab.meaning: sự cải tiến lặp đi lặp lại (thay đổi dần dần)
vocab.example: Most sites I visit don't change overnight; instead, they undergo constant iterative improvement to fix minor bugs.

vocab.meaning: trở nên nặng nề vì những tính năng cũ lỗi thời
vocab.example: I've noticed some older forums are becoming bloated with legacy features that make the site feel quite sluggish.

vocab.meaning: sự chuyển dịch trọng tâm mang tính then chốt
vocab.example: There has been a pivotal shift in focus on my favorite news site toward short-form video rather than text-heavy articles.

vocab.meaning: phản hồi chạm/tương tác trực quan
vocab.example: Recent updates have introduced more intuitive tactile feedback on the mobile web version, enhancing the overall touch experience.

vocab.meaning: chính sách kiểm duyệt/lọc nội dung
vocab.example: I've observed a stricter content curation policy on social platforms lately to combat the spread of misinformation.

vocab.meaning: giao diện vụng về, khó sử dụng
vocab.example: One site I use recently replaced its clunky interface with a much more fluid and modern navigation system.

vocab.meaning: các yếu tố trò chơi hóa (nhằm tăng tương tác)
vocab.example: Many e-learning websites have started to include gamification elements like badges and leaderboards to keep students motivated.

vocab.meaning: nâng cấp cơ sở hạ tầng hệ thống (phần chìm)
vocab.example: Although the look remains the same, a major backend infrastructure upgrade has made the loading speeds significantly faster.

vocab.meaning: bảng điều khiển được cá nhân hóa
vocab.example: The most welcome change was the introduction of a personalized dashboard that highlights my most-read topics.

vocab.meaning: chuyển sang mô hình kinh doanh nửa miễn phí nửa thu phí
vocab.example: Quite a few design blogs have made the transition to a freemium model, offering basic tips for free while charging for deep-dive tutorials.
